reasoning: My Lakshmir Bhandar comes from Mamata's government every month, my mother-in-law's Swasthya Sathi card works because of the schemes here, and my daughter got Kanyashree money for school—all of this is TMC. The booth people here got me enrolled in Swasthya Sathi when I needed it. Shantanu is from Bangaon, yes, but what does an MP in Delhi matter to my life? My kantha cloth sells through my self-help group, my mother-in-law gets treated, my Lakshmir Bhandar comes on time—that's because of Mamata's government here in Bengal, not because of speeches in Delhi.
primary_drivers: Lakshmir Bhandar stipend—it comes on time every month from TMC schemes
Swasthya Sathi card—saved us money for mother-in-law's cataract surgery
Local TMC booth committee relationship—they got me enrolled in schemes
